falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above $50,000 with a single-day trading volume exceeding 200% of the 30-day average
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout with extreme volume would indicate a strong bullish trend, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal expecting a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average by at least 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish crossover would signal a confirmed uptrend, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict expecting a continuation of the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The Relative Strength Index (RSI) forms a bearish divergence (price makes higher highs while RSI makes lower highs) on the daily chart
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A bearish divergence would indicate weakening bullish momentum, directly contradicting the pattern's expectation of a bottom formation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
